# #16 ipce iodide extended ★

> CH3NH3PbI3/TiO2 cell shows extended spectral response to 800 nm but lower peak IPCE of 45%, reflecting broader but less intense absorption

## Derivation
- **Strategy**: deduction
- **Premises**:
  - [[bandgap_bathochromic_shift|#05 bandgap_bathochromic_shift]]

> [!REASONING]
> The iodide perovskite has a narrower bandgap than bromide, shifting absorption to longer wavelengths but with lower peak IPCE
